title: amaryllis × bracteata
intro: Amaryllis × bracteata, also known as the Belladonna Lily or Brandy Bottle, is a species of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in containing alkaloids such as scopolamine and hyoscyamine, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Amaryllis × bracteata include its use as a natural antispasmodic, anticholinergic, and sedative, making it effective in treating conditions like insomnia, anxiety, and muscle spasms. Herbal preparations of Amaryllis × bracteata include tinctures, teas, and extracts, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and digestive problems.
